---
name: "\U0001f4a1 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an enhancement for the WikiMe plugin.
title: '[FEATURE]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### 🎯 Problem / Goal
What limitation are you facing or what new capability do you want?

### 🛠️ Proposed Solution
How should it work?

### 📊 Scope
- [ ] Triage logic (what gets saved)
- [ ] Markdown file format / evolution tracking
- [ ] Dashboard UI
- [ ] Encryption / security
- [ ] Bulk import
- [ ] Other

### 📝 Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples.
